title: Zeus' SMP Pack
description: A collection of Fabric performance and QOL enhancing client mods for a better Minecraft experience in SMPs!
body:
Performance and QOL **Fabric** mods for Zeus' SMP, it can be used on any SMP though, of course.

Warning:
**The modpack was created on the 1.21.9 Minecraft version, and so, any 1.21.8 or lower mods will crash the pack.**

As more performance and QOL mods move to the newer version, they will be added to the pack. I will try to keep the pack lightweight as the goal was, so any older, unnecessary mods will be removed as it is updated.
